meta.summary: Juicer Tools 2.20.00 command-line utilities for creating, validating, dumping, normalizing, and analyzing .hic contact map files.
meta.description: Juicer Tools 2.20.00 command-line utilities for creating, validating, dumping, normalizing, and analyzing .hic contact map files.

test: juicer_tools --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Juicer Tools Version 2.20.00' >/dev/null && juicer_tools --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'pre [options]' >/dev/null

juicer_tools pre 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer_tools pre' >/dev/null && juicer_tools dump 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer_tools dump' >/dev/null && juicer_tools validate 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer_tools validate' >/dev/null

juicer_tools addNorm 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer_tools addNorm' >/dev/null && juicer_tools pearsons 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer_tools pearsons' >/dev/null && juicer_tools eigenvector 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer_tools eigenvector' >/dev/null

juicer_tools apa 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer_tools apa' >/dev/null && juicer_tools arrowhead 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer_tools arrowhead' >/dev/null && juicer_tools hiccups 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer_tools hiccups' >/dev/null && juicer_tools hiccupsdiff 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:   juicer_tools hiccupsdiff' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-juicer-pre && cd /tmp/taf-juicer-pre && printf 'chr1	10000
' > chrom.sizes && printf '0 chr1 100 0 0 chr1 500 1
0 chr1 1000 0 0 chr1 1500 1
0 chr1 2000 0 0 chr1 2500 1
0 chr1 3000 0 0 chr1 3500 1
' > contacts.txt && JUICER_TOOLS_JAVA_XMX=512m juicer_tools pre -n -r 1000 contacts.txt tiny.hic chrom.sizes >/dev/null && test -s tiny.hic && JUICER_TOOLS_JAVA_XMX=512m juicer_tools validate tiny.hic 2>&1 | grep -F 'Validation successful' >/dev/null && JUICER_TOOLS_JAVA_XMX=512m juicer_tools dump observed NONE tiny.hic chr1 chr1 BP 1000 dump.txt >/dev/null && grep -F '0	0	1.0' dump.txt >/dev/null
